frontmatter.title: RIPE84: Two Kinds of Networking Abroad
frontmatter.description: Networking takes on two meanings in this blog, making connections with other industry professionals and the type of engineering concerned with networks. Both are the point of this post as I endeavour to make sense of the whirlwind week I spent in Berlin at the RIPE 84 conference.

frontmatter.title: Scribe: Putting Control Back in the Hands of Students
frontmatter.description: Reflecting on my undergrad CS thesis.
